    Class FluentJsonContractResolver

    A custom Newtonsoft.Json contract resolver that integrates FluentJson metadata conventions.

    Inheritance
    object
    DefaultContractResolver
    FluentJsonContractResolver
    Implements
    IContractResolver

    object.ToString()
    Namespace: FluentJson.Newtonsoft
    Assembly: FluentJson.Newtonsoft.dll
    Syntax
    public class FluentJsonContractResolver : DefaultContractResolver, IContractResolver
    Remarks

    Overrides default behaviors to support DDD patterns such as mapping to private fields and instantiating via private constructors, while avoiding properties not explicitly mapped.

    Constructors

    | Edit this page View Source

    FluentJsonContractResolver(IJsonModel)

    Initializes a new instance of the FluentJsonContractResolver class using a pre-compiled JSON model.
